title: Convert JSON Value to YAML
cap_description: Convert a JSON scalar value to YAML format
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a JSON scalar value (string, number, boolean, null) to its YAML representation. Use this for the simplest scalar type bridging between JSON-producing and YAML-consuming caps.

## Inputs

A JSON scalar value.

## Outputs

The value in YAML format.

## Notes

- For objects, use [Convert JSON Object to YAML Mapping](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;record;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:record;textable;yaml").
- For arrays, use [Convert JSON Array to YAML List](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;list;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:list;textable;yaml").
- For the reverse, use [Convert YAML Value to JSON](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:json;textable").
